sourceTitle: Guide for students: best practice when using Generative AI
evidenceSnippetOriginal: Copilot Enterprise is available for all ANU staff and students by signing in with an ANU account. The main benefit of using CoPilot with an ANU account is that personal and company data is protected.
evidenceLocator: Section: FAQs - Which Generative AI tools should I choose?
